title: What to watch in Arizona’s primaries
extracted_text:
[feed summary]
The Grand Canyon State is holding an earlier-than-usual July primary on Tuesday, teeing up consequential races for governor, key statewide election offices and congressional races.  Arizona lawmakers passed legislation in February to change their primary date from August to July to make sure the state had enough time to prepare for the November general election.   Republicans are eyeing a rare opportunity to oust first-term…
notes: Verified against final benchmark run (Qwen3-8B-Q5_K_M, v4 prompt). Model assigned T3.
